# Moly — Lido MCP Server

> Moly provides 13 tools for interacting with the Lido staking protocol on Ethereum via the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Connect any MCP-compatible AI agent to stake ETH, query balances, wrap/unwrap tokens, manage withdrawals, and participate in governance.

## MCP Endpoint

URL: https://moly-mcp.vercel.app/api/mcp
Transport: Streamable HTTP (POST)
Authentication: None required

## Configuration Headers (optional)

- x-lido-mode: "simulation" (default) | "live"
- x-lido-network: "testnet" (default) | "mainnet"
- x-lido-chain: "hoodi" (default for testnet) | "ethereum" (default for mainnet)

## Tools

### Read Tools (7)

#### get_balance
Get ETH, stETH, and wstETH balances for an Ethereum address.
Parameters:
  - address (string, required): Ethereum address (0x...)
Returns: { address, network, chain, balances: { eth, stETH, wstETH } }

#### get_rewards
Get staking reward history for an address.
Parameters:
  - address (string, required): Ethereum address
  - days (number, optional, default: 7): Number of days to look back
Returns: { address, network, period, note }

#### get_conversion_rate
Get the current stETH/wstETH exchange rate.
Parameters: none
Returns: { network, 1_stETH_in_wstETH, 1_wstETH_in_stETH, note }

#### get_withdrawal_requests
Get pending withdrawal request IDs for an address.
Parameters:
  - address (string, required): Ethereum address
Returns: { address, network, requests, count }

#### get_withdrawal_status
Get finalization status for specific withdrawal requests.
Parameters:
  - request_ids (string[], required): Array of withdrawal request IDs
Returns: { network, requestIds, statuses }

#### get_proposals
Get recent Lido DAO governance proposals with vote counts.
Parameters:
  - count (number, optional, default: 5): Number of proposals to fetch
Returns: { network, total, proposals: [{ id, open, executed, startDate, yea, nay, votingPower }] }

#### get_proposal
Get full details for a single governance proposal.
Parameters:
  - proposal_id (number, required): Proposal ID
Returns: { network, id, open, executed, startDate, snapshotBlock, supportRequired, minAcceptQuorum, yea, nay, votingPower }

### Write Tools (6)

All write tools return simulation results by default (gas estimates, expected outputs). No transactions are broadcast by the hosted server.

#### stake_eth
Stake ETH to receive stETH.
Parameters:
  - amount (string, required): Amount of ETH to stake (e.g. "0.1")
  - dry_run (boolean, optional, default: true): Simulate without broadcasting
Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountEth, estimatedGas, expectedStETH, mode, note }

#### request_withdrawal
Queue stETH for withdrawal from Lido.
Parameters:
  - amount (string, required): Amount of stETH to withdraw
  - dry_run (boolean, optional, default: true)
Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountSteth, note }

#### claim_withdrawals
Claim ETH from finalized withdrawal requests.
Parameters:
  - request_ids (string[], required): Finalized withdrawal request IDs
  - dry_run (boolean, optional, default: true)
Returns: { simulated, network, action, requestIds, note }

#### wrap_steth
Wrap stETH into wstETH (non-rebasing wrapper for DeFi compatibility).
Parameters:
  - amount (string, required): Amount of stETH to wrap
  - dry_run (boolean, optional, default: true)
Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountSteth, expectedWstETH, note }

#### unwrap_wsteth
Unwrap wstETH back to stETH.
Parameters:
  - amount (string, required): Amount of wstETH to unwrap
  - dry_run (boolean, optional, default: true)
Returns: { simulated, network, action, amountWsteth, expectedStETH, note }

#### cast_vote
Cast a vote on a Lido DAO governance proposal.
Parameters:
  - proposal_id (number, required): Proposal ID to vote on
  - support (boolean, required): true = Yea, false = Nay
  - dry_run (boolean, optional, default: true)
Returns: { simulated, network, action, proposalId, vote, proposal, note }

## Supported Chains

### Hoodi Testnet (default)
- Chain ID: 560048
- Contracts: stETH (0x3508A952...), wstETH (0x7E99eE3C...), Withdrawal Queue (0xfe56573...), Voting (0x49B3512c...)

### Ethereum Mainnet
- Chain ID: 1
- Contracts: stETH (0xae7ab965...), wstETH (0x7f39C581...), Withdrawal Queue (0x889edC2e...), Voting (0x2e59A20f...)

## Dashboard

Landing: https://moly-mcp.vercel.app
Web UI with AI chat: https://moly-mcp.vercel.app/dashboard
Documentation: https://moly-mcp.vercel.app/docs
Full reference: https://moly-mcp.vercel.app/llms-full.txt
